passing_score_scale: Percentage (70% passing for all written exams)
exam_format: Linear (computer-based at Prometric for written; hands-on for practical)

testing_centers.notes: Written exams administered at Prometric testing centers. Practical exams administered at NCCCO-authorized testing sites — not at Prometric. Search for authorized sites at nccco.org.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required at Prometric test center. Name on ID must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, or reference materials permitted. Written exams administered at Prometric; practical exams at NCCCO-authorized sites. Candidates must schedule written and practical exams separately. Both written and practical components must be passed for full certification.
renewal_options: Certifications valid for 3 years. Renewal requires passing the practical re-examination. Written exam retake may also be required depending on certification type. Renew at nccco.org before certification expiration.

retake_policy.notes: Contact NCCCO directly for current retake waiting periods and fees. Written and practical retakes are scheduled and priced independently.

official_study_resources.title: NCCCO Candidate Handbook
official_study_resources.notes: Free candidate handbooks available per certification at nccco.org
